title: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 is out for I, II, III, IV, V Year and Pharm.D (PB) examinations. Students can check May 2026 supply and instant exam schedules, subject-wise paper dates, timings, and download the official PDF from osmania.ac.in.

sections.heading: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 OUT

content.text: Osmania University has officially released the Pharm.D Time Table 2026 for various years including I, II, III, IV, V Year (Supply & Instant) and Pharm.D (PB) I & II Year examinations. The theory exams are scheduled in May 2026. Students can check and download the complete timetable from the official examination portal of Osmania University.

The timetable PDFs are available for direct download. Students are advised to verify all dates, timings, and paper titles carefully from the official document. In case of any discrepancy, contact the Examination Branch, Osmania University immediately.
Download the Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 PDF here.

sections.heading: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: Osmania University has announced the May 2026 examination schedule for Pharm.D (6YDC) and Pharm.D (3YDC) (Post Baccalaureate) programmes. The timetable covers supply and instant examinations for different years with specific timings for morning and afternoon sessions.

rows: I, II, III, IV, V Year (6YDC) and I, II Year (PB)

sections.heading: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 provides a detailed subject-wise schedule for all years. Different years have separate exam timings. Students should note their respective year and paper timings carefully for the May 2026 examinations.

sections.heading: How to Download Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 directly from the official examination portal. The process is quick and does not require any login credentials.

items: Visit the official Osmania University website at www.osmania.ac.in.
Go to the Examination section or directly access the Examination Timetables page.
Locate the latest notifications for Pharm.D or Pharmacy examinations May 2026.
Click on the relevant Pharm.D Time Table 2026 PDF link.
The timetable will open in your browser window.
Save the PDF file to your device for future reference.
Print a clear copy of the schedule to plan your exam preparation effectively.

content.text: Students should carefully review the official timetable and note down all important dates and timings. Keep a printed or digital copy handy throughout the examination period.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Osmania University Pharm.D Time Table 2026 contains all necessary information for the May 2026 examinations. It helps students prepare according to the exact schedule and guidelines.

items: Examination name and session - May 2026
Programme and year details (Pharm.D I to V Year and PB I & II Year)
Date and day of each theory paper
Timings for different years (10:00 AM - 1:00 PM or 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM)
Subject / Paper titles
Type of examination (Supply / Instant)
Notification number and date
Signature of the Controller of Examinations
